entry.title: New: CC 26-1 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
COUNCILMEMBER PALTIN, transmitting a proposed amendment to Resolution 25-230, entitled "REFERRING TO THE LĀNAʻI, MAUI, AND MOLOKAI PLANNING COMMISSIONS A PROPOSED BILL AMENDING THE COMPREHENSIVE ZONING ORDINANCE TO ESTABLISH THE H-3 AND H-4 HOTEL DISTRICTS".

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
